x-enumeration-literals.name: Retail Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is a standard account managed by the investor. The investor issues instructions for the account to the financial institution.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mandate Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is fully managed by the financial institution, that is, an investor gives a 'mandate' to the financial institution to execute a mutually agreed investment strategy on its behalf.(ISO20022)
